hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 530 m from property

address.address1: Jl. Jend. Ahmad Yani No.19-21, Peunayong, Kec. Kuta Alam

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.0/10 on cleanliness

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights.

details.title: Infant 0-0 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 1-2 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 3 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Medan Peunayong Hotel is very strategically located near dining places and souvenir shops.
comments.originalComment: Hotel medan Peunayong sangat strategis dekat dengan tempat kuliner dan tempat beli oleh-oleh

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This hotel looks ordinary from the outside... but the service and facilities are quite good.. Compared to renting that red one.. I swear this is good.
comments.originalComment: Hotel ini terlihat biasa aja dr luar... tp pelayanan dan fasilitasnya cukup oke.. Dibanding kelen sewa si merah2 itu.. Sumpah ini bagus

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The hotel is strategically located in the center of the hustle and bustle, and at night, a variety of cuisines are available for sale. The hotel is clean, and the staff is friendly. Even though I booked online, the receptionist still served me warmly, and the hotel facilities remained the same, not differentiating like the incident at Hotel Siwah, where the online booking facilities were different and were served by male staff who were very unfriendly.
comments.reviewTitle: The hotel is clean, and the service is friendly.
comments.originalComment:
Hotel nya strategis berada di pusat keramaian dan malam nya ada dijual berbagai macam kuliner. 
Hotel nya bersih, pelayan juga ramah. 
Walopun pesan via online, receptionis tetap melayani dgn ramah dan fasilitas hotel ttap dpt sama, tidak membedakan seperti kejadian di Hotel Siwah, krn pesan online fasilitas hotel dibedakan, dilayani juga oleh petugas yg laki sgt tidak ramah.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Not a bad location n walk to river n food options, but tired n needing renovation. Rooms r big n has AC. WiFi very poor n irregular. Bathrooms stained n very worn. For the price it should hv been better…..

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: My room was on the second floor, facing the steeet..no soundproofing i could hear everything..also on the interior of the room windows are not light insulated..so when turning off lights..lights from coridor can enter..had to go and turn off all lights outside my room...bathroom sink hose exploded..its a pretty old hotel which needs maintanance...thought i must say..it has some character...bed and and pillows comfy..big room..freindly staff

comments.reviewComments: Good service, nice facilities, and cleanliness is also maintained. Overall the best and great! Awesome!
comments.originalComment:
Pelayanan baik,fasilitasnya bagus,kerbersihan juga terjaga.
Pokoknya terbaik dan oke!
Mantap!

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Noise, limited parking space, some bathroom facilities are damaged and have not been replaced.
comments.originalComment: Bising, tempat parkir terbatas, fasilitas kamar mandi ada yg rusak blm di ganti
